title: California State Route 1
subtitle: A coastal drive during the Verily summer
summary: A Pacific coast travel node tied to the California internship period, with a scenic route through places like Half Moon Bay, Santa Cruz, Monterey, and 17-Mile Drive.

detail.text: Among the old travel artifacts, this one is especially visual. It reads more like a route sketch than a diary entry: coastlines, viewpoints, and a day-long line from the Bay toward Monterey during the Verily summer.
